findings.detail: Backend: /health, 10 failures, 6s period. Frontend: /api/health

findings.item: VPC connector configured for private egress
findings.detail: salonos-prod-vpc with private-ranges-only egress
Backend: 2-10 instances, 80 concurrency. Frontend: 1-5 instances

findings.item: Frontend allows unauthenticated access in production
findings.detail: cloudrun-production.yaml shows allow_unauthenticated: false but current deploy scripts may differ

findings.item: Multi-stage builds used across all Dockerfiles
findings.detail: Backend, frontend-next, and frontend all use multi-stage builds to minimize image size
Backend: USER nodejs (uid 1001). Frontend-next: USER nextjs (uid 1001)

findings.item: Alpine-based images for smaller attack surface
findings.detail: All services use node:20-alpine
CRITICAL vulnerabilities scanned with fail-on-error
Migration validation, lint, type-check, unit tests, build, docker-build, secrets validation

findings.item: Trivy container scanning with SARIF output
findings.detail: Scans CRITICAL/HIGH/MEDIUM/LOW, uploads artifacts
Runs on push to main/develop and weekly cron

findings.item: Production deployment uses GCP_SA_KEY instead of Workload Identity
findings.detail: deploy-production.sh and rollback.sh use service account key file. Staging CI uses Workload Identity.
salonos-prod-vpc with /28 range (16 IPs)

findings.item: Cloud SQL uses private IP only
findings.detail: No public IP, private-ranges-only VPC egress
Connect mode: PRIVATE_SERVICE_ACCESS

findings.item: No explicit Cloud Run firewall rules documented
findings.detail: Relying on Cloud Run managed security defaults
Cloud Run handles load balancing natively
cloudrun-production.yaml uses --set-secrets for all 30+ secrets

findings.item: Staging CI validates secrets before deployment
findings.detail: validate-secrets.sh checks all required secrets exist

findings.item: Backend deploy script passes secrets as env vars in plain text
findings.detail: redeploy_backend_cloudrun.sh: --set-env-vars=DB_USER=${DB_USER},... exposes secrets in command line

findings.item: Seed-secrets.sh may have generated weak secrets
findings.detail: Need to verify secret rotation has occurred
6 widgets: API response time, throughput, memory, CPU, errors, DB query time
4 policies: High API latency (>5s p95), High CPU (>90%), High Error Rate (>10/min), High Memory (>90%)
No notification channels configured - alerts will fire but nobody will be notified
Metrics like custom.googleapis.com/api/response_time_p95 need to be implemented in code

findings.item: Runbooks referenced but existence not verified
findings.detail: https://salonos.dev/runbooks/* URLs in alert documentation

findings.item: PostgreSQL 15 with pg pool connection pooling
findings.detail: max: 20 connections, idleTimeout: 30s, connectionTimeout: 15s
REGIONAL availability type, PITR enabled, 7 retained backups
daily_backup.sh with GCS upload, verify_backups.sh for weekly checks
Cloud SQL has deletion_protection: true

findings.item: Backup scripts require DB credentials as env vars
findings.detail: daily_backup.sh sources DB_PASSWORD from environment

findings.item: Next.js standalone output for efficient serving
findings.detail: frontend-next uses output: 'standalone' for minimal image
.next/static copied separately in Dockerfile
Static assets served from Cloud Run instance storage
Basic nginx config with try_files /index.html fallback

critical_issues.title: Backend deploy script exposes secrets in command-line arguments
critical_issues.description: scripts/redeploy_backend_cloudrun.sh passes secrets via --set-env-vars which exposes them in process list and logs
critical_issues.impact: Secrets visible in 'ps aux', cloud logging, and shell history
critical_issues.fix_required: Use --set-secrets with Secret Manager references instead of --set-env-vars

critical_issues.title: Alert notification channels not configured
critical_issues.description: All 4 alerting policies have notificationChannels: [] - alerts fire but nobody is notified
critical_issues.impact: Production incidents will not alert on-call personnel
critical_issues.fix_required: Configure notification channels (email, PagerDuty, Slack, etc.) and link to policies

critical_issues.title: Production deployment uses service account key instead of Workload Identity
critical_issues.description: deploy-production.sh and rollback.sh authenticate using GCP_SA_KEY service account file. Staging already uses Workload Identity.
critical_issues.impact: Long-lived credentials risk. SA key may expire or be compromised.
critical_issues.fix_required: Migrate to Workload Identity Federation like staging CI/CD (Sprint 6 roadmap item)

warnings.title: No Cloud CDN for static asset caching
warnings.description: Static assets (JS, CSS, images) served directly from Cloud Run instances
warnings.impact: Higher latency for geographically distributed users, higher Cloud Run costs

warnings.title: Frontend production deployment not aligned with production YAML
warnings.description: cloudrun-production.yaml defines frontend config but frontend-next deploy script doesn't use it

warnings.title: Secret rotation not automated
warnings.description: Secrets like JWT_SECRET, DB_PASSWORD generated once. No automated rotation.
warnings.impact: Compliance risk if secrets are compromised

warnings.title: Custom metrics implementation not verified
warnings.description: Alert policies reference custom.googleapis.com/* metrics that must be implemented in application code

warnings.title: No documented firewall rules
warnings.description: Relying on Cloud Run defaults. No explicit firewall rules for VPC

warnings.title: Backup verification not automated in CI
warnings.description: verify_backups.sh exists but not integrated into deployment pipeline

before_go_live: Fix CRIT-001: Update redeploy_backend_cloudrun.sh to use --set-secrets
Fix CRIT-002: Configure at least one notification channel for alerts
Fix CRIT-003: Migrate production deploy to Workload Identity
Verify all custom metrics are implemented in backend/frontend code
within_30_days: Implement Cloud CDN for static asset caching
Integrate backup verification into CI pipeline
Document firewall rules and VPC architecture
nice_to_have: Blue-green/canary deployment automation in GitHub Actions
Database connection pooling metrics in dashboards
Automated DR drills with rollback testing

positive_findings: Multi-stage Docker builds with non-root users across all services
Comprehensive CI pipeline with migration validation, linting, testing, and security scanning
Production-grade infrastructure: VPC, Private IP DB, HA Cloud SQL, Secret Manager
Blue-green deployment with health checks and automatic rollback
Performance monitoring dashboard with 6 key metrics
pg Pool with appropriate connection limits (max: 20)
Cloud SQL deletion protection and PITR enabled
